scripts.build: npm run build -w @veewo/claw-core && npm run build -w @veewo/claw && npm run build -w @claw-kit/openclaw-adapter && npm run build -w @claw-kit/codex-adapter
scripts.check: npm run build -w @veewo/claw-core && npm run check -w @veewo/claw && npm run check -w @claw-kit/openclaw-adapter && npm run check -w @claw-kit/codex-adapter
scripts.test: npm run build -w @veewo/claw-core && npm run build -w @veewo/claw && npm run test -w @veewo/claw-core && npm run test -w @veewo/claw
